title: Wrong multiple join result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c0 Int32, c1 String);
CREATE TABLE t4(c0 Float32, c1 UInt8);
SELECT * FROM t3, t4 ARRAY JOIN (SELECT t3.c0 AS col_0, t4.c0 AS col_1) AS subQuery2 WHERE subQuery2.col_0 >= 5 RIGHT JOIN t1 ON 1;
key_bug_features: Multiple join with LATERAL produces incorrect results
